A man in black (Yul Brynner) recruits six hired guns to lead Mexican villagers against the gang of an outlaw (Eli Wallach).
programme.title: The Magnificent Seven

programme.desc: A poor Chicago secretary (Diana Ross) takes the fast lane to fame as a model and a fashion designer.
programme.title: Mahogany

programme.desc: When scientists suspect that an alien force is attacking Earth, they send two spaceships to weaken the enemy.
programme.title: Battle in Outer Space

programme.desc: British pirate William Kidd captures Adm. Blaine's treasure ship and hides the bounty in a cave. Three years later, Kidd, posing as a sea captain, offers his services to the king as an escort ship.
programme.title: Captain Kidd

programme.desc: White liberals must overcome their own latent racism when their strong-willed daughter announces her intention to marry a distinguished black physician.
programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner

programme.desc: Goofy professor Kelp's potion turns him into Buddy Love, a lounge singer at ease with a coed and a crowd.
programme.title: The Nutty Professor

programme.desc: Mark Twain's boy hero (Tommy Kelly) watches his own funeral with Huck Finn (Jackie Moran) and enters a cave with Becky (Ann Gillis), chased by Injun Joe.
programme.title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer

programme.desc: Unlucky in love, an 1880s Midwestern schoolteacher devotes 50 years of her life to her students.
programme.title: Cheers for Miss Bishop

programme.desc: A massive tidal wave hits the island, bringing stranded Gilligan, Skipper and the rest of the gang back to civilization.
programme.title: Rescue From Gilligan's Island

programme.desc: A space scientist (Hugh Marlowe) figures out how to down a fleet of alien spacecraft looming over Washington, D.C.
programme.title: Earth vs. the Flying Saucers

programme.desc: U.S. soldiers (Van Johnson, John Hodiak, Ricardo Montalban) from all over fight in the Battle of the Bulge.
programme.title: Battleground

programme.desc: A Brooklyn bookkeeper (Don Knotts) falls off a pier, turns into a fish and helps the Navy track U-boats.
programme.title: The Incredible Mr. Limpet

programme.desc: S01 E23 — Joby A stable boy helps Stoney and Ves by subduing two men who are trying to rob the rodeo office.
programme.title: Stoney Burke

programme.desc: Railway police take action when kidnappers choose their busy station as the drop-off point for their ransom money.
programme.title: Union Station

programme.desc: Bumpkins Moe, Larry and Curly Joe (The Three Stooges) help an ice-skating Snow White (Carol Heiss) find her Prince Charming (Edson Stroll).
programme.title: Snow White and the Three Stooges

programme.desc: A pet deer changes a boy (Claude Jarman Jr.) and his parents (Gregory Peck, Jane Wyman), pioneering farmers in Florida after the Civil War.
programme.title: The Yearling

programme.desc: Two Montana cowboys (Jerry Reed, Tom Selleck) head for Nashville and help a woman (Morgan Fairchild) find her sister.
programme.title: The Concrete Cowboys

programme.desc: A San Francisco playgirl (Tippi Hedren) follows a bachelor (Rod Taylor) to Bodega Bay where, for no apparent reason, flocks of birds begin killing the populace.
programme.title: The Birds

programme.desc: The muscular hero forms Ursa Major and fights space robots to save a princess who has been kidnapped.
programme.title: Hercules

programme.desc: An ex-convict bandit (Marlon Brando) finds the partner (Karl Malden) who betrayed him is now a town sheriff with a wife (Katy Jurado) and daughter.
programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks

programme.desc: A stewardess (Doris Day) runs for her life once she realizes her second husband (Louis Jourdan) killed her first.
programme.title: Julie

programme.desc: Socialite Irene Bullock needs a forgotten man to win a scavenger hunt and finds Godfrey Park, who resides in a dump by the East River. She hires him as a butler, to the chagrin of her spoiled sister Cornelia, who seeks to get Godfrey fired.
programme.title: My Man Godfrey

programme.desc: Blondie (Penny Singleton) fills in for Dagwood (Arthur Lake) at the office, so he can go on a fishing trip.
programme.title: Blondie Meets the Boss

programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes (Basil Rathbone) and Dr. Watson (Nigel Bruce) prowl foggy moors to save Sir Henry (Richard Greene) from a killer-dog family curse.
programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles

programme.desc: A hit man (Frank Sinatra) and company plan to shoot the president when he gets off his train in Suddenly, Calif.
programme.title: Suddenly

programme.desc: A lovesick attorney (Raymond Burr) tries to trap a murder client (Angela Lansbury) he got acquitted by arranging for her to kill him.
programme.title: Please Murder Me

programme.desc: Two brothers (Spencer Tracy, Robert Wagner) climb to a plane crash in the Alps: one to help, the other to loot.
programme.title: The Mountain

programme.desc: Two brothers (Spencer Tracy, Robert Wagner) climb to a plane crash in the Alps: one to help, the other to loot.
programme.title: The Mountain

programme.desc: Sam Craig, a New York sportswriter marries Tess Harding, a political columnist whose career comes first.
programme.title: Woman of the Year

programme.desc: International swindlers are diverted from their sinister dealings when an explosion wrecks the ship they are aboard.
programme.title: Beat the Devil

programme.desc: When a dirty Scotland Yard cop is linked to a string of robberies across Europe, the agency asks a famous French detective (Alan Arkin) to help them find the culprits.
programme.title: Inspector Clouseau

programme.desc: A folksy New England poet (Gary Cooper) inherits $20 million he doesn't want and tells a New York newswoman (Jean Arthur) why.
programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes to Town

programme.desc: An outlaw (John Wayne), a prostitute (Claire Trevor), a drunken doctor and assorted others go through Indian country.
programme.title: Stagecoach

programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S05 E05 — Bathroom Time From chases to standoffs with unexpected leaks, this proves crime doesn't pay-or wipe.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S02 E02 — Drinking on the Job Part 2 Mixologists drink on the job and are arrested for driving under DUI.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S04 E20 — Wild Power Trips Public officials try to talk, bluff and squirm their way out of trouble.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S01 E16 — Celebrities Caught Celebs find themselves in sticky situations when fame meets misfortune.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S02 E06 — Moving Violation A speeding rental truck sends police on a pursuit that ends in chaos.
programme.title: Police Pursuits by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E05 — Chaos on the Highway Chaos erupts on the highway as a wanted man makes his escape.
programme.title: Police Pursuits by Law&Crime

programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S02 E16 — Instant Regret An Ohio woman faces arrest after allegedly calling the police when Walmart staff asked her to exit the store.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E18 — The Origin Story of Wade Wilson The origins and crimes of Wade Wilson, the real life Deadpool, are explored.
programme.title: Interrogations by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E10 — Mysterious Toddler Death A 2-year-old left in the care of her mom's boyfriend dies under mysterious circumstances.
programme.title: Interrogations by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E08 — Group Chat Murder Three teens ambush a classmate outside his home; group chat evidence leads police straight to suspects.
programme.title: Law&Crime Investigates

programme.desc: S01 E03 — The Pike County Massacre A family is gunned down in a small Ohio town, and a messy custody battle uncovers the massacre's truth.
programme.title: Law&Crime Investigates

programme.desc: S04 E06 — High Wire Act An inmate thinks cops lost his money; a drunk man of god; a transvestite prostitute is stabbed; a drunk trapeze artist driving a moped.
programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: S04 E07 — Handle With Care A sloppy and combative drunk; a man tries to run from the police after crashing his car; a man blows all of his casino winnings; tricked by a bail bondsman.
programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: S04 E08 — Wedlock-Up A meth user tries to prove he is tough; a drunk woman's rage; officers find a couple's meth stash; busting a senior.
programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: S04 E09 — LV NYE Offices in jail and on the streets prepare for the arrests and aftermath of New Year's Eve festivities in Las Vegas.
programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: S01 E124 — In & Out A dangerous car chase ends when a suspect rear ends a vehicle at an intersection, he is immediately apprehended; cops see men two men in a car late at night and as they approach the car they see a man put a bag in the center console.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E125 — Don't Spill the Beverage Cops recognize a woman who has a felony warrant for drug trafficking in a high crime neighborhood; a girl who was raped 14 times and has a child is arrested for prostitution.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E126 — Man's Confession A male suspect proves to be immune to the effects of a taser; vandals are tracked down by both the police and the owner of the house toilet-papered; an armed man hearing voices calls 911 on himself.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E127 — Playdoughing Around A bicyclist takes off on foot and attempts to hide in his four-year-old daughter's bed; police determine the identity of a human skull found in a park; a man passing through customs is held.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S03 E01 — Florida Mom A Florida mother is arrested after allegedly attempting to sell her baby for $500.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E14 — Roided Out Man offers to go toe-to-toe with five officers who confront him.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S04 E06 — Motel 6 Stabbing Bodycam footage shows the investigation surrounding the death of a woman who is found stabbed 34 times at a Motel 6.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S02 E13 — Walmart Thieves Shoplifters get caught by police at Walmart.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S04 E04 — Entitled College Students Students turn everyday police encounters into full-blown disasters.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S01 E13 — Wild Drivers Wild drivers are confronted by police after reckless behavior.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S05 E17 — Fast & Foolish Teens Fast cars, reckless teens, and high-speed chases - see what happens when ego outruns common sense.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S01 E128 — Wedding Feud Three car passengers are busted for three ounces of marijuana; police resolve a feud between owners of competing wedding chapels; two house burglars.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E129 — Cops and Robbers An abandoned truck on the train tracks lead officers to a drunk driver; an abusive boyfriend is arrested for threatening his girlfriend with a brick; a bicyclist is discovered with a loaded gun in his pocket.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E130 — Cat and Mouse A drug dealer claims to be running from gunfire, not the police; a man is busted twice for trying to steal wishes from the Mirage Fountain in Las Vegas; an officer questions a couple.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E131 — Pursuit of Trouble A vehicle thief's run across state lines is brought to an end; officers stop a fight after a panhandler tries stealing; both parties of a domestic dispute accuse each other of illegal drug possession.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E132 — Boy Tears A bondsman hammers his way into a house to revoke a bond; an ex-convict is stopped for carrying a BB gun; a suspicious driver goes the wrong way down a one-way street; a man tries to break into his ex-girlfriend's apartment.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E133 — Family Mayhem A suspended license prompts a motorcyclist to flee from police; police catch a male suspect with a spotty memory; two roommates are taken to jail for fighting over a live-in girlfriend; a driver hits a pedestrian.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E134 — Chatroom Lies A man's grandmother scolds him for being caught carrying drugs and a gun; an abusive husband's confusion over his wife's relationship with his friend gets him arrested; a driver uses her sister's identity to avoid charges.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E135 — Better Fish to Fry A suspect tests his swimming skills while evading police; a driver gives chase and crashes his yellow Pontiac Firebird; a young man is arrested for threatening his mother with a knife; an officer deals with a reckless biker.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded
